folders.name: Monstrum Libri Vol. 1 - Woodlands and Mountains

documents.name: Adlet
documents.folder: Monstrum Libri Vol. 1 - Woodlands and Mountains

identity.description: Small canine humanoids related to goblins, organised into woodland packs and clans that overrun isolated travellers through numbers and simple tactics.

source.book: Anime 5E Monstrum Libri Volume 1: Woodlands and Mountains

combat.defenseSummary: AC 16; HP 9 (2d6+2); Small body, AC Bonus, light/medium armour proficiency, and standard small-size drawbacks.
combat.offenseSummary: Mace +5 for 1d6-1 bludgeoning; Bite +5 for 1d4-1 piercing. Combat Mastery improves attack rolls, while Speedburst supports short aggressive movement.

system.statBlock:
Source: Anime 5E Monstrum Libri Volume 1: Woodlands and Mountains, PDF p. 11.

Attributes: AC Bonus 2; Armour Proficiency 2; Combat Mastery 2; Features 1 (Darkvision 60 ft.); Heightened Senses 2 (Hearing, Smell); Language 1 (Common, Goblin); Skill Proficiency 1 (Perception); Special Movement 1 (Speedburst); Unique Attribute 1 (Small, light, and unobtrusive); Weapon 1 (Bite).

Defects: Limited Damage 2; Obstacle 2 (distracted by movement of small objects or creatures); Obstacle 4 (Strength dice rolls); Slow 1; Susceptible 2; Unique Defect 1 (thrown weapon distance divided by 2).

Points: 2 Attribute/Defect subtotal + 10 Base + 70 Abilities = 82.

notes.overview: Bull adlets are Medium-sized aggressive variants whose Rank 2 bite inflicts 2d4 damage.

source.book: Anime 5E Monstrum Libri Volume 1: Woodlands and Mountains
